login.title: Sign in
login.resendVerificationSuccess: Email sent again, please check your inbox.

register.title: Sign up
register.successMessage: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Follow it to activate your account.

verifyEmail.title: Email confirmation
verifyEmail.success: Email confirmed, you can sign in now.
verifyEmail.missingToken: The confirmation token is missing from the link.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG, WEBP or GIF, up to 5MB
profile.avatarPending: The new avatar will be uploaded when you save
profile.unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page?

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Email is not confirmed. Check your inbox or resend the confirmation email.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session has expired, please sign in again
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong, please try again
